# POXIOL Teamwear

POXIOL is a custom teamwear and sports uniform manufacturer for teams, clubs, schools, events, distributors, wholesalers and sportswear brands.

## Website
https://poxiol.com/

## Core Pages
- Home: https://poxiol.com/
- Free Mockup Request: https://poxiol.com/free-mockup/
- Contact: https://poxiol.com/contact/
- About: https://poxiol.com/about/
- Factory: https://poxiol.com/factory/
- OEM/ODM: https://poxiol.com/oem-odm/

## Main Product Categories
- Custom Basketball Uniforms: https://poxiol.com/custom-basketball-uniforms/
- Custom Soccer Kits: https://poxiol.com/custom-soccer-kits/
- Custom Baseball & Softball Uniforms: https://poxiol.com/custom-baseball-softball-uniforms/
- Custom Running & Marathon Wear: https://poxiol.com/custom-running-marathon-wear/
- Custom Training Wear: https://poxiol.com/custom-training-wear/
- Custom American Football Uniforms: https://poxiol.com/custom-american-football-uniforms/
- Custom Volleyball Uniforms: https://poxiol.com/custom-volleyball-uniforms/
- Custom Ice Hockey Jerseys: https://poxiol.com/custom-ice-hockey-jerseys/
- Custom Tennis Wear: https://poxiol.com/custom-tennis-wear/
- Custom Golf Wear: https://poxiol.com/custom-golf-wear/

## Key Capabilities
- Free custom teamwear mockup request
- MOQ 1 flexible custom orders
- Basketball, soccer, baseball, running, training and multi-sport teamwear
- Sublimation printing and custom name / number / logo placement
- OEM/ODM sportswear collection support
- Factory quality control and global delivery support

## Brand Safety
POXIOL does not use unauthorized professional league logos, real team marks, famous athlete likenesses or third-party sports brand logos in its original website assets.
